name: Sausage Gravy (for Chicken Fried Steak or Bis
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble sausage into a large saucepan and cook over medium-low heat.
2. Add onion and cook, stirring until transparent.
3. Drain any excess drippings, leaving about 2 tablespoons in the pan.
4. Stir in flour and cook over medium-low heat for about 6 minutes or until the mixture bubbles and turns golden.
5. Stir in milk. Gradually add seasonings; continue cooking, stirring until thickened.
6. Serve over biscuits or chicken fried steak.
Yield: 4 servings.
